items.contentSnippet:
Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.

Stars: 32000
Forks: 3359
items.creator: usestrix

summaries.zh: Strix 是一款开源的 AI 渗透测试工具，用于发现和修复应用程序漏洞。该工具使用 Python 开发，在 GitHub 上拥有 27635 个星标和 3094 个分支。
summaries.en: Strix is an open-source AI penetration testing tool designed to identify and fix vulnerabilities in applications. Written in Python, it offers a robust solution for security assessments. The tool has gained significant popularity, boasting 27,635 stars and 3,094 forks on its repository. Its primary function is to automate the detection of security flaws, aiding developers in enhancing app security effectively.

items.summary: Strix 是一款开源的 AI 渗透测试工具，用于发现和修复应用程序漏洞。该工具使用 Python 开发，在 GitHub 上拥有 27635 个星标和 3094 个分支。
